_comment: Example OpenClaw configuration for iMessage Monterey plugin

imessage-monterey._comment_dbPath: Path to Messages database. Leave empty to use default ~/Library/Messages/chat.db
imessage-monterey._comment_prefix: Optional command prefix. Set to '!claw' to require prefix for all commands
imessage-monterey._comment_pollIntervalMs: How often to check for new messages (milliseconds). Default: 10000 (10s)
imessage-monterey._comment_requirePrefixForAllowlist: If true, even allowlisted senders must use the prefix
imessage-monterey._comment_allowFrom: List of allowed phone numbers or emails for DMs when dmPolicy is 'allowlist'
imessage-monterey._comment_groupAllowFrom: List of allowed senders in group chats
imessage-monterey._comment_textChunkLimit: Maximum characters per message chunk (iMessage has limits)
imessage-monterey._comment_mediaMaxMb: Maximum media file size in MB
imessage-monterey._comment_includeAttachments: Whether to include message attachments in context
imessage-monterey._comment_accounts: For multi-account setups (rarely needed for iMessage)
